properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The only thing I want in life Is to be known for loving Christ To build His church to love his bride And make His name known far and wide

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For this cause I live For this cause I'd die I surrender all, for the cause of Christ All I once held dear I will leave behind For my joy is this Oh the cause of Christ

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He is all my soul will prize Regardless of the joy or trial When agonizing questions rise In Jesus all my hope abides

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: Jesus my Jesus for your glory, for your name Jesus my Jesus I will only sing your praise :/ 3x

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: It is not fame that I desire Nor stature in my brothers eyes I pray it's said about my life That I lived more to build your name than mine. For the cause of Christ.
